Why Rew3vent

WhyBuildonRew3vent?

Every City

Mumbai, Delhi, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai, Kolkata — and growing! Find events in your city.

Free to Host

Create events at zero cost. NFTs, tickets, rewards — all in one place. Free for every creator in India.

Indian Web3 Community

50,000+ Indian Web3 enthusiasts. Builders, artists, traders, gamers — all in one place.

Join Now

ReadytoBegin?

India's Web3 revolution starts here. Host your own event or join someone else's. Either way, do it on Rew3vent.
